title: Implement pest management strategies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement pest management strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for pest management strategy implementation

pcs.text: Access and interpret the pest management plan and discuss requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and interpret the pest management plan and discuss requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and interpret the pest management plan and discuss requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Determine declared species in legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine declared species in legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine declared species in legislation.

pcs.text: Identify concepts of the pest management plan and impact on implementation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify concepts of the pest management plan and impact on implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify concepts of the pest management plan and impact on implementation.

pcs.text: Identify key stakeholders and take into consideration their opinions about the pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key stakeholders and take into consideration their opinions about the pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key stakeholders and take into consideration their opinions about the pest management plan.

pcs.text: Identify, select and prepare resources required for implementation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select and prepare resources required for implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select and prepare resources required for implementation.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, risks and controls required according to health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, risks and controls required according to health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, risks and controls required according to health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify budgetary constraints for pest management plan and ensure planned activity is within budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify budgetary constraints for pest management plan and ensure planned activity is within budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify budgetary constraints for pest management plan and ensure planned activity is within budget.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for pest management strategy implementation

elements.title: Assess targeted pest

pcs.text: Identify the targeted pest and determine pest characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the targeted pest and determine pest characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the targeted pest and determine pest characteristics.

pcs.text: Identify pest management control method according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pest management control method according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pest management control method according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify pest status according to location, land use, legislative requirements, benefits and damage caused
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify pest status according to location, land use, legislative requirements, benefits and damage caused?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pest status according to location, land use, legislative requirements, benefits and damage caused.

pcs.text: Assess target area for hazards, environmental risks and conflicting outcomes with pest management plan,
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess target area for hazards, environmental risks and conflicting outcomes with pest management plan,?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess target area for hazards, environmental risks and conflicting outcomes with pest management plan,.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess targeted pest

elements.title: Implement the pest management plan

pcs.text: Use safeguards to ensure that the target pest is controlled, and other species remain unharmed according to plan outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safeguards to ensure that the target pest is controlled, and other species remain unharmed according to plan outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safeguards to ensure that the target pest is controlled, and other species remain unharmed according to plan outcomes.

pcs.text: Assess and control environmental impacts and use biosecurity and sustainability principles as outlined in the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and control environmental impacts and use biosecurity and sustainability principles as outlined in the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and control environmental impacts and use biosecurity and sustainability principles as outlined in the plan.

pcs.text: Use appropriate application processes and techniques to achieve desired period of control
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate application processes and techniques to achieve desired period of control?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate application processes and techniques to achieve desired period of control.

pcs.text: Ensure animal welfare, property, stock and duty of care comply with federal and state legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure animal welfare, property, stock and duty of care comply with federal and state legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure animal welfare, property, stock and duty of care comply with federal and state legislation.

pcs.text: Assess the effectiveness of the plan using relevant monitoring techniques and survey data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the effectiveness of the plan using relevant monitoring techniques and survey data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the effectiveness of the plan using relevant monitoring techniques and survey data.

pcs.text: Apply follow-up controls to manage reinfestation according to procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply follow-up controls to manage reinfestation according to procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply follow-up controls to manage reinfestation according to procedures.

elements.title: Complete activities pertaining to the pest management plan

pcs.text: Dispose of pest waste according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of pest waste according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of pest waste according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Review and assess outcomes of the plan with supervisor to inform future pest management plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and assess outcomes of the plan with supervisor to inform future pest management plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and assess outcomes of the plan with supervisor to inform future pest management plans.

pcs.text: Complete required documentation and make recommendations to supervisor according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete required documentation and make recommendations to supervisor according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete required documentation and make recommendations to supervisor according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, store and maintain equipment, tools and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, store and maintain equipment, tools and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, store and maintain equipment, tools and machinery.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
